acceptedIds: Arizona driver's license or non-operating ID
Tribal enrollment card or other tribal ID
Valid federal, state, or local government photo ID
Arizona Voter Registration Card with photo
exceptions: Voters without photo ID may show two non-photo documents with name and address (utility bill, bank statement, government check, paycheck). Without any ID, voters cast a provisional ballot.
provisionalBallotRules: Voters without ID can cast a provisional ballot and provide ID by the 5th business day after the election.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Arizona prohibits use of devices capable of recording audio/video within 75 feet of a polling place entrance.
